name: Suspicious Svchost Activity Detected
description: Detects anomalous `svchost.exe` activity, which is unusual if launched without significant command-line arguments and may indicate code injection by malicious processes.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious `svchost.exe` activity has been detected. Event Details: **Event ID** {EventID}, **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Image** {Image}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}, **Parent Image** {ParentImage}. Investigate whether this activity is a process injection attempt or legitimate system service/application activity. Pay special attention to the command line and parent process.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for process creation (should be 1).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the executable (should be svchost.exe).

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to launch svchost.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The image of the parent process that launched svchost.exe.
